case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DAVID MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, DAVID
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET, UNIT #514, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ENDORSED COPY RETURNED IN SASE.
